_comment: Installer size baseline (bytes) for Task #1015 / T58 size guard. Per-extension entries; checked by scripts/check-installer-size.mjs. Bump only via dedicated PR with reviewer sign-off (NEVER auto-commit from CI). Spec: docs/superpowers/specs/v0.3-fragments/frag-11-packaging.md §11.5(6).
_rebaselined_2026_05_01: PR #765 — manager rebaseline decision. Replaced placeholder estimates with first real CI measurements from runs/25219450679 + new ceilings in scripts/check-installer-size.mjs CEILING_MB. Original baseline + ceilings were copied from frag-11 §11.5(6) pre-v0.3-daemon-split estimates; v0.3 split the daemon out of Electron-main into a separate pkg-built binary with its own native deps + intentional SDK closure duplication for loadSdk() shim, so +27%~+71% growth is the architectural physical result of the split, not a regression. Numbers below = observed bytes (not rounded MB) so future deltas are precise. Rebaseline rationale documented in PR body + frag-11 §11.5(6).
